Here’s the implementation of the function based on your prompt:  

```python
def min_operations_to_semi_ordered(nums):
    n = len(nums)
    pos1 = nums.index(1)
    posn = nums.index(n)
    
    operations = pos1 + (n - 1 - posn)
    
    if pos1 > posn:
        operations -= 1
    
    return operations
```
